infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HoofTrack uses the camera to photograph hooves during shoeing sessions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HoofTrack lets you attach hoof photos from your library to records.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: HoofTrack uses the microphone for voice-to-text notes.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: HoofTrack transcribes spoken notes into hoof records.
